title: Case Task
description: JSON companion file for case task files. Stores machine-touched metadata alongside the human-readable Markdown task file.

id.description: Task slug matching the .md filename, e.g. authkit-nextjs-1-issue-53

status.description: Current lifecycle status. Transitions enforced by task-status.sh, not this schema.

repo.description: Target repo name from projects.json (e.g. authkit-nextjs)

issue.description: Issue identifier (e.g. 53 for GitHub, DX-1234 for Linear)

contractPath.description: Path to ideation contract.md (only for issueType: ideation)

mode.description: Pipeline execution mode. Attended = human monitors and can intervene. Unattended = autonomous with auto-abort on failure.

profile.description: Pipeline profile — determines which phases run. tiny = skip verify (docs/config), standard = all phases (default), complex = all phases with done contract required.

agents.description: Tracking for each agent phase in the multi-agent pipeline

tested.description: Set by mark-tested.sh only (via --from-marker flag). Do not set directly.

manualTested.description: Set by mark-manual-tested.sh only (via --from-marker flag). Do not set directly.

prUrl.description: Pull request URL after PR creation

fastTestCommand.description: Fast test command targeting only changed files (e.g. 'pnpm vitest --related'). Run first during keep/discard; full suite only if this passes. If null, falls back to full test command from projects.json.

checkCommand.description: Shell command that outputs a single number measuring progress. Implementer runs after each attempt to decide keep/discard.

checkBaseline.description: Value of checkCommand before implementation starts. Captured by implementer at setup.

checkTarget.description: Target value for checkCommand. Task succeeds when checkCommand output >= checkTarget.

pendingRevision.description: Persisted evaluator revision request. Present when an evaluator found fixable issues and the pipeline was interrupted before the implementer could address them. Cleared after successful re-implementation.
